prompt: Dramatic, low-angle ground perspective full-body shot captured with a 50mm lens at f/1.4, featuring the specific {argument name="uploaded face reference" default="uploaded face reference"} (neat beard, slicked-back hair, wearing stylish aviator glasses, tailored high-fashion modern clothing) standing on the platform of {argument name="location" default="Trocadéro"} at night. He is dressed in a {argument name="outfit" default="structured black velvet blazer over a black cashmere roll-neck sweater"}, tailored black trousers, and polished black boots, looking up intently at the fully illuminated Eiffel Tower, which dominates the background. Directly behind him is a deep sapphire blue Bugatti Chiron, reflecting the surrounding city lights. His foot is planted on the rear tire, with his body leaning casually back. The composition uses a shallow depth of field, rendering the distant Parisian street lights and crowd into a creamy bokeh. Spotlighting from city lamps creates dramatic, high-contrast shadows. 8k resolution, photorealistic, cinematic high-fashion editorial aesthetic.
translatedPrompt: 采用 50mm 镜头、f/1.4 光圈拍摄的低角度地面全身照，主角为 {argument name="uploaded face reference" default="上传的人脸参考"}（整洁的胡须、大背头、佩戴时尚飞行员墨镜、身着剪裁考究的现代高定服装），站在夜晚的 {argument name="location" default="特罗卡迪罗广场"} 平台上。他身穿 {argument name="outfit" default="黑色丝绒修身西装外套，内搭黑色羊绒高领毛衣"}，搭配剪裁合身的黑色长裤和擦得锃亮的黑色皮靴，正凝视着背景中灯火辉煌的埃菲尔铁塔。他身后是一辆深宝石蓝色的 Bugatti Chiron，车身映照着周围的城市灯光。他的一只脚踩在后轮胎上，身体随意地向后倚靠。构图采用浅景深，将远处的巴黎街灯和人群虚化为奶油般的焦外成像。城市路灯的聚光效果营造出戏剧性的高对比度阴影。8k 分辨率，照片级真实感，电影级高定时尚杂志风格。

breakdown.creativeCore: 电影感巴黎时尚大片：一个精致的时尚摄影提示词，将特定的人脸参考融入到巴黎戏剧性的夜景场景中。
breakdown.subject: 服饰
constraints: 过度真实导致细节瑕疵显眼
breakdown.bestUse: 游戏角色、IP 形象、Cosplay、职业角色设定

analysis.copyTemplate:
Create a 人物/角色 image for [用途/受众].

Main subject:
[主体]，[数量/状态/动作]，[关键外观/材质/身份]。

Scene:
[地点/环境]，[时间/天气/时代]，[背景元素]。

Composition:
[参考构图: full-body]。

Visual style:
[参考风格: realistic, photorealistic, cinematic, editorial]。

Lighting and camera:
[参考光线镜头: shallow depth, depth of field, lens]。

Text requirements:
[是否含文字/精确文字/可读性要求]。

Quality constraints:
clean, coherent, polished, readable hierarchy, no random text, no visual clutter.
